cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Schedule an appointment to learn more about this service.

faq.answer: The timeline varies widely depending on the procedures involved. A makeover combining whitening and bonding might be completed in just a few visits, while a plan that includes veneers, implants, or orthodontics could take several months. During your consultation, we provide a detailed timeline so you know exactly what to expect.
faq.question: How long does a smile makeover take?

faq.answer: Because every smile makeover is unique, the cost depends on the specific procedures included in your plan. During your consultation, we provide a complete cost breakdown and discuss payment options, including financing plans, to help make your ideal smile achievable within your budget.
faq.question: How much does a smile makeover cost?

faq.answer: Our patients overwhelmingly say yes. A smile makeover is an investment in your confidence, your appearance, and your quality of life. Many patients tell us it is one of the best decisions they have ever made. We encourage you to schedule a consultation so we can show you what is possible for your smile.
faq.question: Is a smile makeover worth it?

title: Smile Makeover
benefits: Comprehensive approach that addresses all cosmetic concerns at once
Personalized treatment plan tailored to your unique goals and budget
Digital smile design lets you preview your results before treatment begins
Coordinated care that ensures every element of your smile works in harmony
subtitle: Your personalized plan for the smile you have always wanted
whatToExpect: Your smile makeover journey starts with a detailed consultation, during which we take photographs, digital scans, and possibly X-rays to fully assess your dental health and cosmetic concerns. We discuss your goals and use digital smile design software to show you a preview of potential outcomes. From there, we develop a phased treatment plan that outlines every procedure, the order in which they will be performed, the expected timeline, and the associated costs. Treatment may span several appointments over weeks or months depending on the complexity of your plan. Throughout the process, we check in regularly to make sure you are comfortable and delighted with the progress. To schedule your smile makeover consultation, call us at (845) 555-0180.
fullDescription:
A smile makeover is a fully customized treatment plan that combines two or more cosmetic dental procedures to address all of your aesthetic concerns in a coordinated approach. Rather than treating individual issues in isolation, a smile makeover considers the complete picture, including tooth color, alignment, shape, proportion, and how your smile relates to your facial features, to create a harmonious and stunning result.

At our Middletown, NY practice, every smile makeover begins with an in-depth consultation where we listen to your goals, perform a comprehensive examination, and use digital imaging to help you visualize the possibilities. Depending on your unique needs, your plan may include a combination of teeth whitening, porcelain veneers, dental bonding, crowns, implants, gum contouring, or orthodontic alignment. We map out the entire treatment sequence, timeline, and investment so there are no surprises.

Whether you are preparing for a wedding, a career milestone, or simply ready to invest in yourself, a smile makeover can be life-changing. Our patients consistently tell us that their new smile gives them a level of confidence they never thought possible. We take pride in delivering results that look natural, feel comfortable, and stand the test of time.
shortDescription: A comprehensive, personalized cosmetic treatment plan combining multiple procedures to achieve your ideal smile.
